title: T-061 — QA-016 allergen_gates page + allergen_dual_sign_modal (parity)
prompt:
# T-061 — QA-016 allergen_gates page (parity)

PRD: §8.5 traceability QA-070 ↔ UX QA-016 ↔ prototype `allergen_gates`; §11.6 V-QA-ALLERGEN-001/002; §10.3 consumer of 08-PROD allergen_changeover_gate_v1
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:302-422 (allergen_gates) + quality/modals.jsx:637-697 (allergen_dual_sign_modal)

## Goal
Server-rendered allergen changeover gates page with right-side Sheet drawer (cleaning checklist + signatures) + Sign-2nd button opening allergen_dual_sign_modal + override with risk-level gate. 1:1 parity vs prototype.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/app/quality/allergen-gates/page.tsx (RSC) loads gates via Drizzle: SELECT FROM allergen_changeover_validations JOIN work_orders (woFrom/woTo) JOIN users (first/second signer) WHERE org_id=app.current_org_id().
2. KPI strip: pending2nd / approvedToday / rejected — server-aggregated COUNT GROUP BY status.
3. URL searchParam filter: ?status=, ?dateFrom/dateTo, ?lineId.
4. Right-side drawer: shadcn Sheet side='right' opens via ?gateId=; body shows cleaning checklist (from gate.cleaning_checklist JSON), allergen delta (removed/added Badge arrays), ATP RLU + threshold (highlight red if exceeds), signatures (first signer read-only + second signer ESignBlock), Reject button (T-055 rejectAllergenGate), Sign-2nd button (T-055 signSecondAllergenGate via dual-sign modal), Download evidence PDF (Route Handler).
5. allergen_dual_sign_modal (shared via T-055): wraps T-039 ESignBlock for second signer, conditional override block (only when risk_level='low' AND atp_pass=false) with justification min 10.

## Prototype parity
Anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:302-422` (allergen_gates).
Parity checklist:
- KPI strip (3 cards)
- Filter bar (status/date/line)
- Table with WO from→to + allergen delta + ATP RLU + status
- Right-side Sheet drawer with cleaning checklist + signatures + actions
- Sign-2nd opens allergen_dual_sign_modal
- Override conditional block (risk_level='low' only)
- Download evidence PDF button

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/allergen-gates/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/allergenGates/GatesTable.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/allergenGates/GateDrawer.tsx [create]
- packages/ui/src/quality/AllergenDualSignModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/quality/allergen-gates/[id]/evidence-pdf/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/allergenGates/__tests__/AllergenGates.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:302-422 (allergen_gates) + quality/modals.jsx:637-697 (allergen_dual_sign_modal) — parity on structure (KPI strip + filter bar + table + Sheet drawer + dual-sign modal), visuals (shadcn Sheet/Table/Badge/Button + ATP red highlight if exceeds), interaction (URL ?gateId opens drawer + Sign-2nd opens dual-sign modal + override conditional block + Download PDF Route Handler) — RTL + checklist
2. Given gate.status='pending_second_sign' AND role=quality_lead AND ATP pass_flag=true, when Sign-2nd is clicked, then dual-sign modal opens with ESignBlock for second signer (no override block); on confirm T-055 signSecondAllergenGate is called and validation_result='approved'
3. Given gate.status='pending_second_sign' AND ATP pass_flag=false AND risk_level='low', when Sign-2nd is clicked, then dual-sign modal opens with the override block (justification Textarea min 10) visible; on confirm T-055 overrideAllergenGateBlock is called and an allergen_gate_overrides audit row is created
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: AllergenGates.test.tsx asserting parity + Sign-2nd happy path + override conditional rendering + Reject Server Action call before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test AllergenGates'
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- ATP red-highlight from DB atp_rlu vs atp_threshold — never client recompute (translation-notes §QA-016)
- Override block visible ONLY when risk_level='low' (T-055 enforces; UI hides for medium/high)
- Allergen delta from gate.allergens_removed/allergens_added text[] — render Badges (translation-notes §M-11)
- Use shadcn Sheet for right-drawer; do not custom-CSS the drawer
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Sign-2nd button RBAC: quality_lead only (T-055 server-enforces; UI hides for other roles)

pipeline_inputs.description: Allergen changeover gates page (RSC table + Sheet drawer + allergen_dual_sign_modal with override-on-low-risk + evidence PDF Route Handler). 1:1 parity vs prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component loads allergen_changeover_validations JOIN work_orders + signers. KPI strip aggregates pending2nd/approvedToday/rejected. URL searchParams filter status/date/line; ?gateId opens shadcn Sheet side='right' drawer. Drawer body: cleaning checklist (JSON from gate row), allergen delta Badges (removed/added text[]), ATP RLU vs threshold (red highlight if exceeds — DB-driven), signatures (first read-only + second ESignBlock via T-039), action buttons (Sign-2nd → T-055 signSecondAllergenGate, Reject → T-055 rejectAllergenGate, Download evidence PDF → Route Handler). allergen_dual_sign_modal (shared in packages/ui): wraps ESignBlock; override conditional block visible only when risk_level='low' AND atp_pass=false. Anchor: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:302-422 + quality/modals.jsx:637-697.
out_of_scope: Do not implement first-sign flow (08-PROD owner)
Do not modify T-055 Server Actions
Do not implement ATP device integration (P2, §12.3)
